Generic, AI-generated, or one-line answers will be skipped â we read every word. testing, devops, exec Greater Sydney Area, 2026-06-26T19:06:15+00:00 1134183 https://remoteOK.com/remote-jobs/remote-funnel-builder-dsigns-australia-1134183 https://remoteOK.com/assets/logo-square.png Aeronautical Information Service Cadet Grenada Airports Authority The Aeronautical Information Service Cadet will assist in ensuring the flow of aeronautical information necessary for the safety, regularity, and efficiency of international air navigation, in accordance with International Civil Aviation Organization standards. This position serves as preparation for training toward certification as an Aeronautical Information Service Officer.<br><br><strong>Key Responsibilities:<br><br></strong><em>The successful candidate will be required to assist with:<br><br></em><ul><li>Collecting, classifying, recording, editing, and disseminating aeronautical information and Notices to Airmen in accordance with established procedures</li><li>Collecting and transmitting messages relating to arrival, departure, cancelled, and delayed flights</li><li>Disseminating flight plans to the relevant Air Traffic Service units</li><li>Collecting landing, parking, navigation, late operation, and facilitation fees from aircraft operators</li><li>Collecting, verifying, and completing relevant airline and flight documentation, including General Declaration forms and Movement Sheets</li><li>Monitoring aeronautical computer systems, including SPATIA and CADAS, and reporting faults or system malfunctions</li><li>Completing shift log books, reconciliation documents, float records, and other administrative records</li><li>Performing other related duties as assigned<br><br></li></ul><strong>Requirements<br><br></strong><strong>Minimum Qualifications:<br><br></strong>Five (5) subject passes equivalent to G.C.E. Ordinary Level or CXC/CSEC, Grade 3 and above, including:<br><br><ul><li>English Language</li><li>Mathematics</li><li>Physics<br><br></li></ul>No prior work experience is required; however, relevant experience would be an asset.<br><br><strong>Skills &amp; Attributes<br><br></strong><ul><li>Good communication skills</li><li>Accuracy</li><li>Strong attention to detail</li><li>Ability to learn and apply technical aviation-related procedures</li><li>A high level of responsibility and confidentiality<br><br></li></ul><strong>Additional Requirements:<br><br></strong><ul><li>Strong written and verbal communication skills</li><li>Accuracy and attention to detail</li><li>Good computer literacy</li><li>Ability to work shifts, weekends, and public holidays</li><li>Ability to learn and apply technical aviation procedures</li><li>Willingness and ability to travel overseas for required training</li><li>Ability to obtain and maintain the required security clearance</li><li>A clean police record/character certificate<br><br></li></ul><strong>Deadline</strong>: Submit your application via www.jobs.workable.com on or before <strong>10th July 2026</strong> sys admin, education, non tech St. George's, 2026-06-26T18:41:21+00:00 1134169 https://remoteOK.com/remote-jobs/remote-aeronautical-information-service-cadet-grenada-airports-authority-1134169 https://remoteOK.com/assets/logo-square.png Collections Manager National Service Bureau <strong>Benefits:<br><br></strong><ul><li>401(k) matching</li><li>Dental insurance</li><li>Health insurance</li><li>Paid time off</li><li>Vision insurance<br><br><br></li></ul><strong>Benefits:<br><br></strong><ul><li>Competitive Salary</li><li>Employer Paid Medical, Dental, Vision Insurance</li><li>Company Provides EAP (Employee Assistance Program)</li><li>Paid Time Off</li><li>401(k) plan + employer matching contributions</li><li>Monday to Friday schedule</li><li>Must be based out of Sarasota, FL! <br><br><br></li></ul><strong>GROW WITH US! <br><br></strong>National Service Bureau (NSB) is seeking an experienced Call Center/Collections Manager. NSB is focused on Accounts Receivable Management and Subrogation and has grown exponentially over the last 34 years to become a leading national agency. We are looking to find a leader whom is self-motivated, accountable and engaged in personal growth.<br><br><strong>Collections Manager Job Description:<br><br></strong>We are seeking a Collections Manager with experience leading teams, who can empathize with consumers and has the ability to maintain professionalism at all times. This role ensures that all call center, collections, and training goals are met. Other job functions include:<br><br><ul><li>Analyzes, evaluates, and reports on performance, service, KPIs and other metrics </li><li>Makes recommendations for action plans</li><li>Perform continued training and education</li><li>Implements call center and collection operational strategies</li><li>Provides daily personnel management and oversight</li><li>Conducts regular 1:1âs and annual performance reviews</li><li>Recommends changes to employee levels based on activity and performance</li><li>Enforce company policies and hold team members accountable<br><br><br></li></ul><strong> Collections Manager Skills Required:<br><br></strong><ul><li>3-5+ years in a high volume collections management</li><li>Experience in managing a remote team environment</li><li>Experience scheduling call center operations and running call campaigns</li><li>Excellent call center and/or collections management skills</li><li>Results oriented with the energy and ability to deliver results daily</li><li>Strong analytical and problem solving skills</li><li>Understanding of and respect for compliance</li><li>Positive attitude and approach</li><li>Ability to drive, encourage, and motivate a team</li><li>Willingness to exemplify our Core Values<br><br><br></li></ul><strong>Core Values:<br><br></strong><ul><li> Follow Through</li><li> Be Engaged</li><li> Think First</li><li> Be Respectful</li><li> Be Accountable<br><br><br></li></ul><strong>NSB Culture &amp; Environment:<br><br&g
